details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia article and extracted the correct laureates for the 3 most recent years. For 2024: John J. Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton (correct). For 2023: Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, and Anne L'Huillier (correct, all three listed). The agent also reported 2025 winners (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis) as the most recent year on the page, which is valid since the Wikipedia article had been updated to include 2025. All co-laureates for each year were fully listed.
